analysis_basis: guardrail candidates compared against user-approved Codex PII-only labels
codex_analysis_conclusion: Codex-approved guardrail disagreements are already useful as hard negatives, but only ADDRESS is ready for probability comparison. The next data round should target PERSON_NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, REGISTRATION_IDENTIFIER, BANK_ACCOUNT before score tuning.

core_entity_group_analysis.codex_data_collection_target: collect more person-name-like common nouns, brand/shop fragments, and true person-name contexts; current total support is small
current group is usable; add more region-only/location-only hard negatives only if source diversity is needed
collect sample/test/documentation phone-like strings approved as not PII by Codex; keep public organization phone numbers as PII
core_entity_group_analysis.do_not_collect_as_not_pii: public organization or business phone numbers

core_entity_group_analysis.codex_data_collection_target: collect sample/test/placeholder email-like strings approved as not PII by Codex; keep public business emails as PII
core_entity_group_analysis.do_not_collect_as_not_pii: public business or organization email addresses

core_entity_group_analysis.codex_data_collection_target: collect invalid/sample/unrelated registration-like codes that guardrail extracts but Codex approves as not PII
core_entity_group_analysis.do_not_collect_as_not_pii: valid public business or corporate registration identifiers

core_entity_group_analysis.codex_data_collection_target: collect both real account-context candidates and sample/test account-like false positives; current support is absent

next_bounded_run_plan: Collect or stage additional raw rows targeted to guardrail/Codex not-PII disagreements for: PERSON_NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, REGISTRATION_IDENTIFIER, BANK_ACCOUNT
Run existing guardrail candidate extraction without changing detector logic.
Run Codex PII-only classification and user approval in the same label model.
Rebuild hard-negative disagreement rows and probability/logLR evidence.
Run M4-only delta sweep only if all core support gates pass.
phase: Codex data analysis after user-approved PII-only labels
